name: Prize Fruit Chili Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup Pickling Spices (Tied in a Cheesecloth Bag)
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop all vegetables.
2. Mix together all remaining ingredients, adding the chopped vegetables and simmer slowly until thick, about 2 hours.
3. Remove pickling spices and discard.
4. Store in sterilized jars.
